input: ‪Today is the Chinese lunar date 12th day of the 11th lunar month in the Year of the Snake‎. Using the current global time zone system, if it is 2:42 PM in New York City, what is the current local time in Kuala Lumpur?NO EXPLANATIONS.‬
response: The current local time in Kuala Lumpur is 3:42 AM the next day.
